prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no watermarks.

奥利维亚·库克/Olivia Cooke from 肖申克的救赎/Wang Luodan.

A male character of exceptionally high beauty, strikingly handsome with delicate features, clear luminous skin, and an arresting ethereal presence. His face is finely sculpted with high cheekbones, a sharp jawline softened by youth, large deep-set eyes with dark irises that carry an unmistakable weight of sorrow and empathy — eyes that look as though they have witnessed lifetimes of pain that do not belong to him. His brows are elegantly arched, nose straight and refined, lips well-defined with a subtle downward tension suggesting quiet endurance. His complexion is pale, almost translucently fair, consistent with a life spent entirely under artificial light aboard a generation ship — faintly bluish veins visible at his temples hinting at the neurological damage from his empathic ability. Faint dark circles under his eyes betray chronic exhaustion. His expression is calm but fragile, a composed surface barely containing inner turmoil. Attractive, beautiful, delicate features, clear skin, extraordinarily handsome young man in his mid-twenties.

His hair is dark brown, slightly longer than regulation length, loosely swept back but with strands falling across his forehead in a slightly unkempt manner — the subtle dishevelment of someone too burdened to care about appearance yet naturally striking regardless. The hair has a soft texture, catching muted light.

He wears a worn, form-fitting utility jumpsuit in muted steel-blue and charcoal gray, standard-issue for low-ranking medical staff aboard the generation ship "归虚号." The jumpsuit is functional and austere, with reinforced seams at the shoulders and knees, a high mandarin-style collar partially unzipped to reveal a thin ash-colored thermal underlayer. On his left chest is a faded medical cross insignia, barely visible. His sleeves are rolled to mid-forearm, exposing his hands and wrists — deliberate, as his empathic ability requires direct skin contact. Thin, web-like scarring patterns trace along his inner forearms and fingertips, pale silver against his skin, residual marks from repeated neural overload during empathic sessions. He wears slim dark utility pants tucked into scuffed, low-profile magnetic boots designed for ship corridors. A small battered satchel hangs at his hip, containing basic medical supplies. Around his neck on a thin cord hangs a tiny crystalline fragment — a shard of extinguished 恒芯 core, a personal memento.

His build is lean and average, neither muscular nor frail — the body of someone surviving on minimal rations, with a quiet physical vulnerability that contrasts his extraordinary inner burden. His posture is upright but carries a subtle forward lean, as if perpetually bracing against invisible weight.

The overall aesthetic is hard science fiction, cold-toned, grounded realism with meticulous material detail — worn fabrics, scratched metal clasps, the lived-in texture of a dying civilization's last uniforms. Photorealistic rendering, cinematic lighting, highly detailed skin texture and fabric weave, realistic proportions, muted desaturated color palette dominated by grays, steel blues, and ash tones with the faintest warm undertone in his skin suggesting the last ember of humanity in a freezing universe., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: realistic
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
